# Hi 👋, I'm Jordan Labrosse AKA Jorgagu

## Fullstack & DevOps Engineer

* 🌍 I'm based in Lyon, France
* 🫶 I love to collaborate on open source projects
* ⚡ Co-Founder & CTO of [GameVerse.app](https://gameverse.app)

![](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/Jorgagu?logo=github&style=for-the-badge)
![](https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=Jorgagu&style=for-the-badge)
